summary: Iteration 49 testing completed for Notification System Refactoring (Step A). Found and FIXED 1 critical bug: missing 'notifPermission' destructuring from useNotifications hook. After fix, all notification features work correctly with ZERO regression.

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: Missing 'notifPermission' in destructuring from useNotifications hook
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Added 'notifPermission' to the destructured values from useNotifications hook

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 49 verified the notification system refactoring (Step A). The refactoring extracted notification logic into 3 new files: utils/notifications.js (constants + helpers), hooks/useNotifications.js (state + polling + handlers), components/NotificationCenter.jsx (NotifBadge, NotificationBell, CrossRoleBanner). One bug was found and fixed: 'notifPermission' was missing from the destructured hook values in CaissePage.jsx. All features now work correctly: (1) Bell button with badge (testid=notif-center-btn, notif-center-badge), (2) Dropdown with items and timestamps (testid=notif-center-dropdown, notif-item-*, notif-item-*-ts), (3) Mark all read button (testid=notif-mark-all-read), (4) Cross-role banner for Admin (emerald) and Manager (amber) with link and dismiss (testid=cross-role-banner, cross-role-banner-link, cross-role-banner-dismiss), (5) Toggle button for notifications (testid=notif-toggle-btn), (6) localStorage persistence for 'caisse_notif_enabled' and 'caisse_notif_ack', (7) Tab badges using effectiveCounts from hook.

tests: Cross-role banner visible with emerald gradient
Banner shows 'Nouvelle(s) information(s) de la Gérante'
Cross-role banner visible with amber/orange gradient
Clicking item navigates to correct tab and closes dropdown
Banner link navigates to latest category tab (testid=cross-role-banner-link)
GET /api/notifications/counts?role=admin returns correct structure with cross_role
GET /api/notifications/counts?role=manager returns correct structure with cross_role

data_testids_verified: notif-center-badge - Red badge showing total count
notif-center-dropdown - Dropdown panel with notification items
notif-center-backdrop - Invisible backdrop to close dropdown
notif-item-{key} - Individual notification items (needs, expenses, etc.)
notif-item-{key}-ts - Timestamp for each notification item
notif-toggle-btn - Toggle button for enabling/disabling notifications
cross-role-banner-link - Clickable area that navigates to latest category
cross-role-banner-dismiss - X button to dismiss banner
